Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert H. Staley, Eq. appeared for plaintiff Johnson Hoke Ltd.
Karen Hoke, principle of Johnson Hoke Ltd., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Eric Chung.
Default was entered against defendant on December 23, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 23, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Johnson Hoke Ltd., and against the Defaulted Defendant Eric Chung as follows:

Damages/Principal - $33,254.13.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,489.29.
Attorney's Fees - $2,518.50.
Costs - $445.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $40,706.92.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
